_comment: Arrow-key nudge demo: zoom in on the lone Spearmen (seed 12345, ~500,300, facing south toward the enemy), select it, then tap Left, Right, and Down. Each arrow orders a small fixed step that HOLDS the unit's south-facing line -- Left/Right side-step, Down back-steps -- so the regiment shuffles into place without turning. Because a unit is selected, the arrows nudge rather than pan the camera. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd. World coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
